mapper.sql: id, user_id, question_id, input_type, text_content, extracted_text, target_score, ai_score, ai_feedback, ai_raw_response, ai_status, ai_provider, ai_model, created_time, is_deleted, deleted_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO writing_record ( user_id, question_id, input_type, text_content, extracted_text, target_score, ai_score, ai_feedback, ai_raw_response, ai_status, ai_provider, ai_model, created_time, is_deleted, deleted_time ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{questionId}, #{inputType}, #{textContent}, #{extractedText}, #{targetScore}, #{aiScore}, #{aiFeedback}, #{aiRawResponse}, #{aiStatus}, #{aiProvider}, #{aiModel}, #{createdTime}, #{isDeleted}, #{deletedTime} )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM writing_record WHERE id = #{recordId} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM writing_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_time DESC, id DESC
SELECT FROM writing_record ORDER BY created_time DESC, id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE writing_record SET ai_score = #{aiScore}, ai_feedback = #{aiFeedback}, ai_raw_response = #{aiRawResponse}, ai_status = #{aiStatus}, ai_provider = #{aiProvider}, ai_model = #{aiModel} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE writing_record SET is_deleted = 0, deleted_time = NULL WHERE id = #{recordId} AND is_deleted = 1
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM writing_record wr
wr.user_id = #{userId} AND wr.is_deleted = 1

SELECT FROM writing_record wr
wr.user_id = #{userId} AND wr.is_deleted = 1
ORDER BY
wr.deleted_time ASC, wr.id ASC
wr.deleted_time DESC, wr.id DESC
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM writing_record wr
wr.is_deleted = 1

SELECT FROM writing_record wr
wr.is_deleted = 1
ORDER BY
wr.deleted_time ASC, wr.id ASC
wr.deleted_time DESC, wr.id DESC
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.update: UPDATE writing_record SET is_deleted = 1, deleted_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{recordId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM writing_record wr WHERE wr.id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT wr.id, wr.user_id, wr.question_id, wr.input_type, wr.text_content, wr.extracted_text, wr.target_score, wr.ai_score, wr.ai_feedback, wr.ai_raw_response, wr.ai_status, wr.ai_provider, wr.ai_model, wr.created_time, wr.is_deleted, wr.deleted_time FROM writing_record wr WHERE wr.user_id = #{userId} AND wr.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY wr.created_time DESC, wr.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT AVG(ai_score) FROM writing_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 AND ai_score IS NOT NULL
SELECT FROM writing_record WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND ai_status = 'FAILED' ORDER BY created_time DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM writing_record WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND ai_status = 'FAILED'
